direction: cache invariant HB1 square root in KLAS iterative boundary solves
rationale: CalculateKlas1 and the iterative branch of CalculateKlas3 recompute sqrt(HB1) on every URB fixed-point iteration even though HB1 is fixed after its fmax clamp. Caching sqrt(HB1) once in a local register removes repeated square-root work while keeping the existing 6.264 multiplication and URB update expression order unchanged.
